title: App to integrate with Cloze CRM
excerpt: We have built basic integrations using systems like Zapier, but it is time consuming and repetitive. Cloze is used by our brokerage, and many others, to manage their transactions, so we cannot abandon it entirely, but we…

posts.author: EmilyF (Emily)
posts.cookedHtml: We have built basic integrations using systems like Zapier, but it is time consuming and repetitive. Cloze is used by our brokerage, and many others, to manage their transactions, so we cannot abandon it entirely, but we need to be able to have Cloze and Monday “speak” to each other, so that when we update a contact or deal in Monday, those changes are reflected in Cloze. It would also be great to include some kind of item view, and widget too, so that each contact and deal can easily see their linked Cloze file without having to leave Monday.com
